name: Pears Baked in Honey
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 F (160 C).
2. Peel, halve, and core the pears, keeping them in water acidulated with half the lemon juice.
3. Dissolve the honey in the water, add the remaining half of the lemon juice, and bring to a boil.
4. Transfer the mixture to an oven-proof dish or pan large enough to keep the pear halves in one layer.
5. Add the drained pear halves and return to a boil.
6. Immediately transfer the dish to the oven and poach until the pears are tender.
7. Remove with a slotted spoon, reduce cooking liquor to a syrup, and pour over the pears.
8. Allow to cool before chilling. Serve with the thickest cream you can find.
